prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-CASHREG-PARENT Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Interactive Sounds Cash Register for Kids with Play Food Microphone, Ages 3+ (Green and Pink) Description: Ready, set, scan and shop.

With play food, interactive sounds, a moveable conveyor belt, working cash drawer with key, card swipe, barcode scanner and intercom microphone speaker, this cash register for kids has it all, endless hours of supermarket shopping and pretend play checkout await. Little ones will have a blast running friends or family through the grocery line as the in-house expert cashier.

This toy cash register for kids is a fantastic learning toy. An easy and fun way for kids to learn about the value of money, math, counting coins and cash handling skills, while simultaneously developing kids social interaction and critical thinking skills. Combining tactile, auditory and visual learning, this cash register is a fun toy to engage little ones in learning.

And, the cosplay or pretend play toy cash register for kids is not only useful for introducing kids to math and counting, it also encourages the development of their fine motor skills and eye hand coordination, as they handle all the groceries and work the cash register. The toys for boys or girls is also a great tool to learn about fruit, vegetables, colors, shapes and sounds as well.

No assembly is required so the fun can begin right out of the box. Batteries are included with purchase.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: toys for boys learning and education toys pretend play cosplay toddlers children parents math games counting toys fine motor skills toys preschool learning activities Christmas gift Hanukkah gift brother gifts Features: - FUN CASH REGISTER FOR KIDS: Ready, set, scan and shop! With groceries, interactive sounds, a moveable conveyor belt, working cash drawer with key, card swipe, barcode scanner and intercom microphone speaker, this cash register for kids has it all; endless hours of supermarket shopping and pretend play checkout await! - LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: The toy cash register is a fun way to learn about the value of money, math, cash handling skills, while also developing kids social interaction and critical thinking skills; combining tactile, auditory and visual learning, this cash register is a great gift to promote fun and learning with little ones! - FINE MOTOR SKILLS TOYS: The electronic cash register for kids is not just useful for introducing kids to math and counting, it also encourages the development of their fine motor skills and eye hand coordination, as they handle all the groceries and work the cash register! The toys for boys or girls is also a great tool to learn about fruit, vegetables, colors, shapes and sounds as well! - FUN PRETEND PLAY FOOD ACCESSORIES: In addition to the cash register, little ones will also get a cute shopping basket to house all their grocery goodies including a juice box, biscuits, a water bottle and more! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 x 6 x 8 inches; Color: Green or Pink; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Note: Batteries Included; Recommended Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
